data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the witness signature option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the presence of a 'witness signature option' as part of the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this feature. Without concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly address the witness signature option, the validation cannot be conclusively determined.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the implementation of the witness signature option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for witness signature option
